nasb.text: O Lord God of Israel, You are righteous, for we have been left an escaped remnant, as it is this day; behold, we are before You in our guilt, for no one can stand before You because of this.”

esv.text: O Lord, the God of Israel, you are just, for we are left a remnant that has escaped, as it is today. Behold, we are before you in our guilt, for none can stand before you because of this.”

cnv.text: 耶和華以色列的　神啊，你是公義的！我們現今才可以留下，成為逃脫的人。看哪，我們在你面前是有罪過的，因此沒有人能在你面前站立得住。’”

ccb.text: 以色列的上帝耶和华啊，你是公义的，所以我们这些余民今天才得以幸存。看啊，我们在你面前身负罪恶，因而无人能在你面前站立得住。”
